title: What you need to know about the preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement signed by Trump
description: Here's a look at the preliminary agreement between the U.S. and Iran, and the challenges that remain to find lasting peace.

title: These Wisconsin swing voters say Trump's war in Iran wasn't worth it
description: The war in Iran was a costly blunder, according to Wisconsin swing voters who participated in two online focus groups that NPR observed.

title: Vice President JD Vance becomes the face of America's negotiations with Iran
description: Vice President JD Vance is becoming the face of the next phase of negotiations with Iran.

title: Labour's Andy Burnham wins a special election, setting up a showdown with Starmer to lead Britain
description: Labour's Andy Burnham, the current mayor of Greater Manchester, has won a special election for a seat in Parliament that puts him in a position to challenge embattled Prime Minister Keir Starmer for leadership of the country.

title: U.S. strike on an alleged drug boat kills 3 in the eastern Pacific Ocean
description: The latest attack brings the number of people who have been killed in boat strikes by the U.S. military to at least 211 since the Trump administration began targeting those it calls "narcoterrorists" in early September.

title: Vance slams Israeli reaction to Iran deal as U.S. military lifts blockade
description: The president defended the agreement, but it has been criticized as a return to the prewar status quo.

title: The Supreme Court’s major cases during the 2025-26 term
description: The Supreme Court has taken up Trump-related cases in its new term, as well as cases dealing with gay and transgender issues and campaigns.

title: U.S. lifts blockade on Iranian ports as 60-day clock for a final deal starts ticking
description: The U.S. is allowing ships to enter and exit Iranian ports and coastal areas as the countries move to a new phase of negotiations over the next 60 days.

title: Sen. Sanders wants Americans to have a say — and stake — in the future of AI
description: Sen. Bernie Sanders talks with NPR's Juana Summers about his new legislation, which would create a sovereign wealth fund, and give the American people a say in regulating AI.

title: Obama Presidential Center dedication: A nod to a past era in politics and future hopes
description: All living former presidents gathered for the dedication of the Obama presidential center in Chicago. It was a star studded event that harkened back to a more-optimistic era in American politics.

title: They're leaving Congress with nothing to lose, spelling potential trouble for Trump
description: A trio of Senate Republicans are on their way out of Congress. Each has previously drawn President Trump's scorn and now each are seen as newly liberated to complicate his agenda if they choose.

title: The Iran agreement is signed. Who are the winners and losers?
description: The U.S. and Iran have signed a preliminary agreement. Who are the winners and losers? We unpack what we know.

title: Government can’t restrict gun ownership over marijuana use, Supreme Court rules
description: In a unanimous decision, the justices ruled in favor of a Texas man who was prosecuted under a federal law prohibiting habitual drug users from owning guns.

title: Vance reveals he has been in touch with Pope Leo amid war disagreements
description: The vice president described his relationship with Leo as “positive” in a podcast interview.

title: How the stock market became Trump’s most favored adviser
description: Trump has increasingly treated the stock market as a real-time referendum on his presidency, citing market gains as justification for many consequential decisions.

title: Senate targets Hegseth’s travel in standoff over apparent Iran school attack, boat strikes
description: Frustrated lawmakers are increasing pressure on the defense secretary to get answers they’ve sought for months.

title: Trump defends his Iran deal, criticizes longtime ally Israel as G-7 ends
description: In a sprawling news conference at the G-7 summit in France, the president touted the economic benefits of the ceasefire and threatened force if it fails.

title: Georgia GOP drops redistricting plan that would hurt Black representation
description: Gov. Brian Kemp had called a special session so Republicans could secure one or more additional House seats in the 2028 elections. But lawmakers pulled the plug.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: Trump says intelligence chief pick’s hearing is off and Pulte will remain for now
description: The Senate postponed the hearing after Trump derailed the process. Sen. Tom Cotton said the president directed Jay Clayton, the DNI nominee, not to appear.
